auth.label: Secret API Key
auth.description: Short.io secret API key used with the Authorization header. Create it in Short.io under Integrations & API: https://developers.short.io/docs/creating-an-api-key.

actions.name: create_link
actions.description: Create a new Short.io link on one of the authenticated domains.

domain.description: Domain hostname that should own the new short link.

path.description: Optional custom path for the short link.

title.description: Optional title for the short link.

allowDuplicates.description: Whether duplicate links to the same originalURL should be allowed.

idString.description: String form of the Short.io link identifier.

domain.description: Domain hostname used by the short link.

DomainId.description: Numeric domain identifier associated with the short link.

path.description: Path segment of the short link.

title.description: Optional title assigned to the short link.

tags.description: Tags assigned to the short link.

shortURL.description: Non-secure short URL returned by Short.io.

secureShortURL.description: Secure HTTPS short URL returned by Short.io.

cloaking.description: Whether cloaking is enabled for the link.

secure.description: Whether the link resolves over HTTPS.

clicks.description: Total clicks recorded for the link, when present.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the link was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the link was last updated, when present.

expiresAt.description: Timestamp when the link expires, when present.

utmSource.description: UTM source parameter applied to the link, when present.

utmMedium.description: UTM medium parameter applied to the link, when present.

utmCampaign.description: UTM campaign parameter applied to the link, when present.

utmContent.description: UTM content parameter applied to the link, when present.

utmTerm.description: UTM term parameter applied to the link, when present.

actions.name: delete_link
actions.description: Delete a Short.io link by link ID.

linkId.description: The unique identifier of the Short.io link.

idString.description: Identifier of the deleted Short.io link.

outputSchema.description: Acknowledgement for a deleted Short.io link.

actions.name: get_domain
actions.description: Get Short.io domain details by domain ID.

domainId.description: The unique identifier of the Short.io domain.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Short.io domain.

state.description: Current configuration state of the domain.

title.description: Optional title assigned to the domain.

linkType.description: Short link generation mode configured for the domain.

TeamId.description: Team identifier associated with the domain, when present.

provider.description: DNS provider configured for the domain, when present.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the domain was created, when present.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the domain was last updated, when present.

actions.name: get_link
actions.description: Get Short.io link details by link ID.

linkId.description: The unique identifier of the Short.io link.

idString.description: String form of the Short.io link identifier.

domain.description: Domain hostname used by the short link.

DomainId.description: Numeric domain identifier associated with the short link.

path.description: Path segment of the short link.

title.description: Optional title assigned to the short link.

tags.description: Tags assigned to the short link.

shortURL.description: Non-secure short URL returned by Short.io.

secureShortURL.description: Secure HTTPS short URL returned by Short.io.

cloaking.description: Whether cloaking is enabled for the link.

secure.description: Whether the link resolves over HTTPS.

clicks.description: Total clicks recorded for the link, when present.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the link was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the link was last updated, when present.

expiresAt.description: Timestamp when the link expires, when present.

utmSource.description: UTM source parameter applied to the link, when present.

utmMedium.description: UTM medium parameter applied to the link, when present.

utmCampaign.description: UTM campaign parameter applied to the link, when present.

utmContent.description: UTM content parameter applied to the link, when present.

utmTerm.description: UTM term parameter applied to the link, when present.

actions.name: get_link_statistics
actions.description: Get click statistics for a Short.io link.

linkId.description: The unique identifier of the Short.io link.

period.description: Time interval used by the Short.io statistics API.

tz.description: Timezone used by the statistics API.

clicksChartInterval.description: Chart granularity used by the Short.io statistics API.

skipTops.description: Whether top breakdown sections should be skipped.

startDate.description: Custom interval start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

endDate.description: Custom interval end date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

inputSchema.description: Request payload for reading Short.io link statistics.

totalClicks.description: Total clicks counted in the selected interval.

humanClicks.description: Human clicks counted in the selected interval, when present.

x.description: Timestamp of the chart data point.

y.description: Click count at the given timestamp.

data.description: Series data points for the current chart dataset.

startDate.description: Start timestamp of the current interval, when present.

endDate.description: End timestamp of the current interval, when present.

prevStartDate.description: Start timestamp of the previous interval, when present.

prevEndDate.description: End timestamp of the previous interval, when present.

interval.description: Interval metadata returned by the Short.io statistics API.

tops.description: Raw JSON object returned by Short.io.

actions.name: list_domains
actions.description: List domains available to the authenticated Short.io API key.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Short.io domain.

state.description: Current configuration state of the domain.

title.description: Optional title assigned to the domain.

linkType.description: Short link generation mode configured for the domain.

TeamId.description: Team identifier associated with the domain, when present.

provider.description: DNS provider configured for the domain, when present.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the domain was created, when present.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the domain was last updated, when present.

actions.name: list_links
actions.description: List links for a Short.io domain with optional pagination and sort order.

domainId.description: The unique identifier of the Short.io domain.

limit.description: Maximum number of links to return.

pageToken.description: Pagination token returned by a previous Short.io response.

dateSortOrder.description: Sort order for link creation time.

idString.description: String form of the Short.io link identifier.

domain.description: Domain hostname used by the short link.

DomainId.description: Numeric domain identifier associated with the short link.

path.description: Path segment of the short link.

title.description: Optional title assigned to the short link.

tags.description: Tags assigned to the short link.

shortURL.description: Non-secure short URL returned by Short.io.

secureShortURL.description: Secure HTTPS short URL returned by Short.io.

cloaking.description: Whether cloaking is enabled for the link.

secure.description: Whether the link resolves over HTTPS.

clicks.description: Total clicks recorded for the link, when present.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the link was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the link was last updated, when present.

expiresAt.description: Timestamp when the link expires, when present.

utmSource.description: UTM source parameter applied to the link, when present.

utmMedium.description: UTM medium parameter applied to the link, when present.

utmCampaign.description: UTM campaign parameter applied to the link, when present.

utmContent.description: UTM content parameter applied to the link, when present.

utmTerm.description: UTM term parameter applied to the link, when present.

total.description: Total number of links that match the current filter.

actions.name: update_link
actions.description: Update an existing Short.io link by link ID.

linkId.description: The unique identifier of the Short.io link.

originalURL.description: Updated destination URL for the short link.

path.description: Updated path segment for the short link.

title.description: Updated title for the short link.

tags.description: Updated tags to assign to the short link.

archived.description: Whether the short link should be archived.

cloaking.description: Whether cloaking should be enabled for the short link.

anyOf.description: Millisecond timestamp string accepted by Short.io.

expiresAt.description: Expiration timestamp to assign to the short link.

redirectType.description: HTTP redirect status code used by the short link.

inputSchema.description: Request payload for updating a Short.io link.

idString.description: String form of the Short.io link identifier.

domain.description: Domain hostname used by the short link.

DomainId.description: Numeric domain identifier associated with the short link.

path.description: Path segment of the short link.

title.description: Optional title assigned to the short link.

tags.description: Tags assigned to the short link.

shortURL.description: Non-secure short URL returned by Short.io.

secureShortURL.description: Secure HTTPS short URL returned by Short.io.

cloaking.description: Whether cloaking is enabled for the link.

secure.description: Whether the link resolves over HTTPS.

clicks.description: Total clicks recorded for the link, when present.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the link was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the link was last updated, when present.

expiresAt.description: Timestamp when the link expires, when present.

utmSource.description: UTM source parameter applied to the link, when present.

utmMedium.description: UTM medium parameter applied to the link, when present.

utmCampaign.description: UTM campaign parameter applied to the link, when present.

utmContent.description: UTM content parameter applied to the link, when present.

utmTerm.description: UTM term parameter applied to the link, when present.
